// wordApi.js
import { axiosInstance } from '@/core/api/axiosInstance';
import type { ApiResponse, PageResponse } from '@/core/api/apiResponse.types';
import type { WordSearchDto, WordSaveDto, WordMstVo, WordDtlVo } from './word.types';

export const wordApi = {
    getList: (params: WordSearchDto) =>
        axiosInstance.post<ApiResponse<PageResponse<WordMstVo>>>('/api/v1/words/search', params),

    getDetail: (id: number) =>
        axiosInstance.get<ApiResponse<WordDtlVo>>(`/api/v1/words/${id}`),

    save: (data: WordSaveDto) =>
        axiosInstance.post<ApiResponse<void>>('/api/v1/words', data),

    update: (id: number, data: WordSaveDto) =>
        axiosInstance.put<ApiResponse<void>>(`/api/v1/words/${id}`, data),

    remove: (id: number) =>
        axiosInstance.delete<ApiResponse<void>>(`/api/v1/words/${id}`),
};
```
